WORK WITH A PASSIONATE, EXPERIENCED CARE COACH

name: Careswitch
description:
The best caregiving app for home care agencies. 
We bundled modern tech and powerful features into one easy-to-use app so caregivers of every skill level are equipped to handle any situation. Ensure caregivers arrive on time and prepared for every visit, with the right information and support they need to focus on providing high-quality care.

A simple workflow designed for caregivers.

name: Lantern Care
description:
Meet Lantern, formerly known as SurgeryPlus and Cancer Care Direct.

You know that friend who always has inside information and great connections? That's Lantern, but for specialty care. If you're facing surgery or a cancer diagnosis or need infusion therapy, we find you the right care at the right time--so you can get back to living your life.

The Lantern app enables surgery members to complete your medical history requirements, view or find your provider options, track and view your consultat

name: Givers for Family Caregivers
description:
Givers enrolls, supports, and pays family caregivers through state programs.

When you qualify for a program that Givers serves, we help you and your loved one with the administration involved in getting enrolled. Once you and your loved one are enrolled, you must work with a licensed agency to document your work, get support, and get paid as their caregiver. Givers can serve as your licensed agency in some states to help you easily meet all requirements.

The Givers app transforms the way you p

name: Serenity Smart
description: Serenity Smart is a secure group messaging application that brings everyone providing care to an older adult together on a single platform to communicate and collaborate, thereby improving quality of care and quality of life.

name: Locus Health
description:
Locus Health is a remote care communications platform designed to improve the home monitoring of medically complex populations, and the engagement of their caregivers, when these patients are at their most vulnerable.

KEY FEATURES 
-Patient submission of condition-specific data via self-reporting  
-Flexible task creation for patient engagement 
-Secure dashboard views of real-time patient trends for patients and clinicians 
-Educational content and Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) tailored to

name: Family Care Circle Mobile App
description:
The key to the best family care of a loved one is Communication. Let us help you track appointments, notes, incidents, transportation needs and more. Family Care Circle will enable you have notes ready to discuss at every Doctor's appointment with confidence.

Track communication between family members related to Family Care of your loved ones.
Track your loved ones appointments and key notes to remember for & from the appointments. Share important information with family about the appointment a

name: Family Caregiver
description:
The mission of Eirene Care is to support family caregivers by using technology to design easy-to-use tools that assist them in their day-to-day caregiving responsibilities. This app is specifically focused on facilitating care for individuals with dementia or those undergoing cancer treatment. It allows caregivers to log daily tasks, track any chemo or radiation side effects and manage care plans and appointments. A few high level functions within the app are: 
Live Support: Get immediate assist

name: CareCircle for Caregiving
description:
CareCircle is the easiest way to create private or public communities for caregiving, support, and shared communication. Whether you’re caring for a loved one, managing a school group, or organizing support for a cause, CareCircle helps you stay connected.

Create a “Circle” for each person, topic, or group you care about. Post updates, photos, and videos. Assign roles like Family, Nurse, or Educator. Control visibility, comments, and messaging—so each Circle is safe, focused, and supportive.

name: Jointly
description:
Care together from anywhere with Jointly! 

Jointly works with circles of care. To initially set up a circle for the person you are looking after you will need to make a one-off payment of £2.99.

Once a Jointly circle has been purchased there is no additional cost for you or the people you invite to join you. You can invite as many people as you want to share the care with you. They can download the app or use the web version at jointlyapp.com

My Virtual Carer helps parents, families, carers, and domiciliary care providers manage, monitor, and coordinate daily care routines, all from one secure, easy-to-use app.

name: CareGiver+
description:
Our caregiving app is designed to support those who care for their loved ones at home by making care simple, organized, and accessible. Easily store and manage essential information—like your loved one’s name, date of birth, emergency and healthcare contacts, allergies, and medications—all in one secure place.
Coming soon: powerful features to schedule care, connect with resources, and coordinate appointments—because caregivers deserve care, too.

With Warm, you can easily coordinate care for your loved ones who need support. Being a caregiver is often challenging, and for families and friends, it can mean juggling various tasks. Warm is designed to make this easier. Instead of managing care through different channels like SMS, email, or phone calls, you can bring everything together in one app—Warm.

name: Brelti: Family Caregiver App
description:
Brelti is a care coordination app designed to help families manage the complex, everyday work of caregiving—together, in one place.

Created by caregivers, Brelti brings your entire care team, important information, and daily tasks into a single, organized system—making care easier to coordinate and easier to sustain.

With Brelti, you can:
• Organize medical, legal, financial, and personal documents in one secure vault
• Coordinate care across family members and caregivers with shared access

Carewall is the care planner for families and caregivers.

Whether you care for a parent, partner, or child — caregiving requires structure, clarity, and teamwork. Carewall helps you organize every care task, appointment, and note in one shared app.

No more scattered chats or sticky-notes. All care information lives in one secure place so everyone stays informed and involved.
